series_metadata.series_title: Managed Care Organization (MCO) Contract Development Papers
series_metadata.series_description: The Managed Care Organization (MCO) Contract Development Papers contains information about the development and analysis of the proposed contract changes made by the BWC Managed Care Organization (MCO) Business & Reporting Unit.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for 2 years after the end of the affiliated contract, and then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain for 2 years after the end of the affiliated contract, and then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
